cells.rationale: Subtle correctness invariant on the shared dispatch/reap input seam where mis-classifying error-vs-empty either freezes a fresh board or mass-reaps, but the slice is small and mirrors the existing DEFER idiom, so high band.

Destructive pane reaping with a TOCTOU/PID-reuse (CWE-367) kill-time re-verification invariant and a shared, unforked occupancy predicate feeding board/escalation/autoclose — a hard opus gate at contract-touching xhigh.

Well-specified allocator branch flip with a nameable acceptance (honor stored cap under worktree, floor to one off, group by root) and a guard test catching the per-lane mis-fix — substantial bounded GPT-first work.

Audit-bypass-creep and ADR-0031 stamp-under-live-closer hazards, a positive-ancestor-evidence invariant, a new daemon-to-plan-CLI coupling, and a pure-core import boundary make this an intelligence-bound contract-shaped change.
